titles.title: Because He Lives, My Redeemer Lives (Mash Up)

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Because He Lives, I can face tomorrow Because He Lives, All fear is gone

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Beacause I know my Redeemer lives I know my Redeemer lives All of creation testifies This life within me cries I know…

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He holds the future And life is worth the living, Just because He lives

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The very same God That spins things in orbit Runs to the weary, worn, and weak

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And the same gentle hands That hold me when I'm broken They conquer death, to bring me victory

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Arise, my love, Arise, my love The grave no longer has a hold on you

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: No more death's sting No more suffering Arise! Arise!

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Well, I know my Redeemer lives I know my Redeemer lives All of creation testifies This life within me cries I know my Redeemer lives And life is worth the living, Just because He lives
